creator: martin@lispworks.com
text:
I also get

Installing updates...rm: ///usr/include/c++/v1/__tuple: is a directory
rm: ///usr/include/c++/v1/__string: is a directory

during freebsd-upgrade from 13.2-RELEASE-p11 to 13.3-RELEASE-p4.

It looks like this is benign in this case, because it has installed the new directories with the correct files.
